# The Progress Group — Quote Request

> Online quoting tool for The Progress Group: fireplaces, braais, lighting and aircons. Customers fill in a short form and receive a tailored quote.

## Pages

- [Request a Quote](/): Fill out the quote form and get a prefilled quote with product, flue kit, floor plate, corner installation and transport pricing.

## Optional

- [The Progress Group main site](https://progressgroup.co.za/): Showroom, product catalog, and contact info.
